gazar.title: Administration Department
gazar.goals: This department is responsible for ensuring the routine and orderly operation of the National Statistical Office, its central departments and units, and the provincial and capital city statistical offices. It organizes human resources allocation at the sectoral level, provides unified management of legal compliance, financial, and accounting operations, and establishes an efficient performance management framework for the statistical system.

Objective.title: Ensure the implementation of Mongolia’s laws and regulations across the statistical sector.
Provide unified human resources management and organizational support; and enhance the capacity and professional skills of civil servants in the statistical system.
Conduct budgetary and financial operations in accordance with legal requirements and promote the principle of transparency in financial reporting.

duties.title: Coordinate the implementation of the Law on Statistics and other relevant laws, regulations, decrees, and decisions at the sectoral level.
Prepare proposals to improve, update, and replace internal regulations, rules, and instructions governing the department’s mandate.
Improve and manage human resources planning and administration for the statistical sector; and implement measures to establish a professional, qualified, and specialized workforce.
Organize training and capacity development activities for civil servants working in the national statistical system.
Organize the work of the State Civil Service Sector Council.

Manage the organization’s official document recording and document management activities in accordance with the relevant laws, regulations, and instructions; monitor and report on these activities; and produce the required reports and information.
Carry out archival operations, including storage, protection, and the transfer of records to the national archives, in line with applicable regulations.
Consolidate and finalize the National Statistical Office’s annual activity report and organize its submission to, and presentation before, the Standing Committee on Economy of the State Great Hural.
Organize the implementation of the national anti corruption programme within the statistical system.
Provide unified management and coordination of financial and accounting operations across the statistical sector.
Be responsible for procurement activities; and provide management and coordination oversight.
Provide centralized, rapid management and coordination support to the Office’s departments and units, as well as to the provincial, capital city, and district level statistical offices.
Implement and comply with the information security management system’s policies, rules, and procedures in all operational activities and ensure their effective application.

In collaboration with the Office’s Risk and Internal Audit Unit, identify, assess, and record risks associated with the department’s mandate; implement measures to reduce risk levels and to prevent future incidents; and organize reporting, training, and methodological support for the relevant committees and leadership.
Carry out the department’s internal operations; implement tasks assigned by the Office’s leadership; and participate in other activities organized by the Office.

gazar.title: Integrated Statistics Department
gazar.goals: Within the mandate and functions assigned by law to the National Statistics Office, this department aims to implement reforms in official statistics and quality management, accelerate the implementation of the System of National Accounts, ensure adherence to the Fundamental Principles of Official Statistics, develop domestic and international cooperation, and carry out data dissemination and communication activities.

Objective.title: To guide the reform process of official statistics and strengthen international and domestic cooperation;
To accelerate the implementation of the System of National Accounts;
To organize activities ensuring compliance with the Fundamental Principles of Official Statistics;
To conduct statistical dissemination and communication activities.

duties.title: To define policies, goals, and objectives of the statistical sector;
To guide and coordinate the implementation of the Generic Statistical Business Process Model;
To conduct regular quality assessments and provide recommendations for improving operational and data quality;
To monitor and support the implementation of the Fundamental Principles of Official Statistics;
To accelerate the implementation of the System of National Accounts;
To promote the implementation of the System of Environmental-Economic Accounting;
To develop and improve methodologies for calculating indicators related to the Sustainable Development Goals and national development policies, and to collaborate with relevant agencies;
To develop, approve, and improve the structure and content of monthly, quarterly, and annual socio-economic publications of Mongolia;
To coordinate and manage international cooperation and external relations;
To ensure unified coordination of data dissemination, public relations, and internal collaboration;
To conduct analytical studies upon request from government, non-governmental, international organizations.
To ensure compliance with relevant laws and regulations;
To implement information security management policies;
To identify, assess, and mitigate risks related to departmental functions and provide recommendations;
To implement internal operations and assigned tasks of the National Statistics Office.

gazar.title: United Statistics Office
gazar.goals: Within the scope of the rights and duties assigned to the National Statistical Committee by law, the National Statistics Committee shall jointly develop official statistics reform and development policies, implement quality management, intensify the penetration of the national calculation system, ensure and coordinate the activities of the sector, and provide unified management for the implementation of the basic principles of official statistics.

Objective.title: Provide management and coordination of official statistical reform activities, develop external and internal statistical relations and cooperation;
Intensification of penetration of the national accounting system;
To provide management and unified coordination of the development and improvement of classifications, methods and methodologies applied at the national level;

Organizing the task of updating and developing a new methodology for calculating the indicators of sustainable development goals and relevant national development policy documents and integrating calculations.

duties.title: Статистикийн үйл ажиллагааны ерөнхий загварыг нэвтрүүлэх үйл ажиллагааг мэргэжлийн удирдлага, нэгдсэн зохицуулалтаар хангах;
Чанарын удирдлагыг хэрэгжүүлэх, чанарын шалгуур үзүүлэлтүүдийг статистикийн үйл ажиллагааны ерөнхий загварын нэвтрэлтийн түвшин бүрт тохируулан шинэчлэн мөрдүүлэх;
Чанарын удирдлагын хүрээнд өөрийн үнэлгээг тогтмол хийж, үр дүнд үндэслэн гүйцэтгэлийн болон мэдээллийн чанарыг сайжруулж ажиллах, нэвтрүүлэхэд хяналт тавих, мөрдүүлэх;

Хүн ам, нийгэм, эдийн засаг, байгаль орчин, гамшгийн салбарын статистикийн мэдээ, тайлан, маягт, заавар, ангилал, аргачлал, арга зүйг олон улсын жишигт нийцрүүлэн хөгжүүлэх, боловсронгуй болгох, нэвтрүүлэх ажлыг удирдлага, нэгдсэн зохицуулалтаар хангах;
Монгол Улсын нийгэм, эдийн засгийн сар, улирлын танилцуулга, жилийн эмхэтгэлийн бүтэц, агуулгыг боловсронгуй болгох асуудлаар санал боловсруулж, шийдвэрлүүлэх;
Албан ёсны статистикийн үндсэн зарчмуудын хэрэгжилтийг хянаж, зөвлөмж чиглэл өгөх;
Мета мэдээллийн бодлогыг тодорхойлж, хэрэгжилтийг хангах;
Стратегийн баримт бичиг боловсруулах, хэрэгжилтийг хангуулах ажлыг удирдан зохион байгуулах;
Үндэсний тооцооны системийн нэвтрэлтийг эрчимжүүлэх;
Байгаль орчин-эдийн засгийн дансны системийн нэвтрэлтийг эрчимжүүлэх;

Тогтвортой хөгжлийн зорилго болон үндэсний хөгжлийн холбогдох бодлогын баримт бичгийн үзүүлэлтүүдийг тооцох арга зүйг шинэчлэх, шинээр боловсруулах, тооцооллыг нэгтгэх ажлыг зохион байгуулж, Үндэсний статистикийн хорооны холбогдох газар, хэлтэс болон төрийн бусад байгууллагатай хамтран ажиллах;
Олон улсын харилцаа, хамтын ажиллагааны бодлого боловсруулан мөрдүүлэх;
Дотоод харилцаа, хамтын ажиллагааны бодлого, журам, зааврыг боловсруулан мөрдүүлэх, зөвлөмж чиглэл өгөх;
Газрын дотоод үйл ажиллагааг хэрэгжүүлэх, хорооны удирдлагын өгсөн үүрэг даалгаврыг хэрэгжүүлэх, хорооноос зохион байгуулж байгаа бусад үйл ажиллагаанд оролцох.

gazar.title: Public Relation Division
gazar.goals: With the aim of implementing the goals of the department, to determine policy and strategy for the development of statistics and to ensure their implementation; to develop international relations and cooperation of the institution; and to prepare proposals and recommendations for improving the legal environment of statistics.

Objective.title: Intensification and expansion of public relation;
Development and introduction of information dissemination methods, forms, procedures and instructions, promotion of statistical activities, delivery of statistical information to users;
Implement relevant laws, documents, programs, provide information to management, and participate in internal operations.

duties.title: To provide professional management and integrated coordination in charge of introducing the GSBPM;
To develop policy and strategy documents for the development of the statistical sector and to ensure the implementation;
Improve and introduce official statistical data, reports, forms, instructions, classifications, methods and methodologies by international standards;
To develop and resolve proposals for improving the structure and content of the social and economic monthly and quarterly bulletins and yearbook of Mongolia;

To compile proposals for goals and measures of the statistical sector to be included in the draft economic and social development plan of Mongolia and other programs and submit them to relevant organizations;

Чанарын удирдлагын бодлогын баримт бичиг, хэм хэмжээний баримт бичиг, шалгуур үзүүлэлтүүд, чанарын тайлан бичих зааврыг статистикийн үйл ажиллагааны ерөнхий загварын нэвтрэлтийн түвшин бүрт тохируулан боловсронгуй болгох, мөрдүүлэх, хэвшүүлэх;

lity management policy documents, normative documents, criteria, and instructions for writing quality reports are developed, implemented, and standardized according to each level of penetration of the GSBPM;
To ensure the implementation of the MNS ISO-9001:2016 quality management standard, introducing the standard and providing quality assurance;
Developing, improving, recommending, cooperating and monitoring quality reports in each sector to develop and standardize quality reports for manufacturers and statistical users;

Within the framework of quality management, develop self-assessment questionnaires, conduct evaluations according to the questionnaires by each employee of the NSO's department and divisions, summarize the results, present them to the committee's management, and take relevant measures;
To develop and implement metadata policies and recommendations;
To provide suggestions and recommendations in the field of improving the legal and legal framework for statistical operations;
To support the activities of the Permanent Council of Methodology;

Updating the methodology for calculating the indicators of the Sustainable Development Goals and relating national development policy documents, leading and organizing the work of making new indicators, integrating the calculations, cooperating with the relevant departments and divisions of the National Office and other government organizations, reporting at the national and global level;

To regulate foreign relations activities following Mongolian laws and international agreements, develop and follow policies and procedures for multilateral and bilateral cooperation, and coordinate foreign correspondence;

To respond to the general coordination of projects and programs implemented with the technical and financial support of international organizations and partners, supervise and present progress to the management and provide information;
International and industry common methods, manuals, instructions, translation, control and verification of statistical data, to provide professional support and promptness of information publication;
To organize the development and refinement of statistical terms and glossaries;

Based on the results of customer satisfaction surveys, access to online data, requests submitted by users to the National Statistics Office, and the annual assessment of the international non-profit organization 'Open Data Watch', determine the need for statistical information and indicators, present them to the executive stuff of the NSO, and take relevant measures;
To organizing the activities of the committee board meetings, taking notes, creating directions for implementation, and ensuring the implementation of decisions;
To implement the internal activities of the department and division and the tasks assigned by the management of the NSO, and to participate in other activities organized by the NSO.

gazar.title: National Accounts Division
gazar.goals: Within the framework of implementing the functions of the department, to accelerate the implementation of the System of National Accounts, compile key macroeconomic indicators, conduct analysis, and prepare them for dissemination to users.

Objective.title: To accelerate the implementation of the System of National Accounts.
To promote the implementation of the System of Environmental-Economic Accounts.
To implement relevant policy documents and programs, provide information to management, and participate in internal operations.

duties.title: To develop and improve methodologies and classifications for national accounts.
To compile Gross Domestic Product (GDP) estimates and prepare analytical reports.
To estimate the size of the informal economy and incorporate it into GDP calculations.
To conduct benchmark surveys related to supply-use tables and input-output tables, consolidate results, perform relevant calculations, and prepare them for dissemination.
To compile the national accounts.
To consolidate statistical information on assets, capital services, and investment.

To gradually implement international recommendations on the development of the System of Environmental-Economic Accounts and other satellite accounts, taking into account national conditions, and to cooperate with relevant organizations in this area.
To provide proposals and recommendations aimed at improving sectoral statistical data.
To comply with standards and quality criteria at each stage and sub-stage of the Generic Statistical Business Process Model, and to prepare and document quality reports for both producers and users.
To prepare statistical publications and reports related to national accounts and submit them to the unit responsible for data dissemination.
To conduct regular self-assessments and improve performance and data quality based on the results.
To prepare the required indicators for international statistical databases.
To perform analytical calculations and studies upon request from the State Great Khural, the Government, other government organizations, and users.
To ensure compliance with the Civil Service Law, the Labor Law, the Archives Law, and other relevant legislation and regulations.
To prepare proposals and draft documents for improving and updating rules and regulations within the scope of the unit’s responsibilities.
To comply with and ensure the implementation of policies, rules, and procedures of the Information Security Management System.

To identify and assess potential risks related to the unit’s functions, implement risk management measures, and cooperate with the unit responsible for operations and risk management in organizing training and methodological support.

To implement the internal activities of the department and division, carry out tasks assigned by the leadership of the National Statistics Office, and participate in other activities organized by the National Statistics Office.

gazar.title: Policy and Cooperation Division
gazar.goals: To implement official statistical reforms, ensure methodological consistency, coordinate international cooperation, contribute to national development policy documents, compile development indicators, and manage statistical dissemination and user engagement.

Objective.title: To guide the activities of official statistical analysis;
To intensify and expand statistical cooperation at international and national levels;
To guide and organize activities ensuring the implementation of the Fundamental Principles of Official Statistics and quality management;
To reflect sector objectives and activities in national development policy documents and ensure their implementation;
To consolidate and disseminate data for global and national development policy indicators;
To develop and implement methods, forms, procedures, and guidelines for dissemination, promote statistical activities, and deliver statistical information to users;
To implement relevant laws, regulations, and programs, provide information to management, and participate in internal activities.

duties.title: To define policies, goals, and objectives of the statistical sector;

To prepare proposals for relevant national development policy documents, develop methodologies for calculating indicators to evaluate the implementation of the Sustainable Development Goals and national development policies, and consolidate calculations;
To regulate foreign relations activities in accordance with Mongolian legislation and international treaties, and to handle day-to-day external correspondence;
To prepare agendas and cooperation briefs for bilateral cooperation meetings and organize such meetings;
To organize joint meetings, training, and events with international and domestic organizations;
To coordinate responses to questionnaires, surveys, requests, and inquiries received from international and domestic organizations through relevant units within the prescribed timeframe;
To guide NSO units in preparing information required for international comprehensive assessments and other evaluations of the national statistical system;
To provide professional guidance and coordination for implementing the Generic Statistical Business Process Model;
To improve policy documents on quality management, normative documents, indicators, and guidelines for preparing user and producer quality reports;
To implement the rules of the permanent methodological council and organize its activities;
To cooperate with relevant departments and other state organizations in collecting, consolidating, calculating, and improving methodologies for SDG and national development policy indicators;
To develop, approve, implement, and report on the sector’s strategic plan;
To implement relevant provisions of procedures for monitoring and evaluating the quality of statistical information;

To develop and approve sector-wide procedures and guidelines on dissemination, public relations, and printed and electronic products, and to improve the structure and content of Mongolia’s monthly and annual socio-economic publications;
To develop and approve schedules for receiving official and administrative statistical reports and for disseminating information;
To monitor and take necessary measures against misuse, misinterpretation, or distortion of statistical information in accordance with the Law on Statistics and relevant regulations;
To regularly organize user satisfaction surveys, advise on the use and importance of official statistics, and conduct training to improve users’ statistical literacy;
To organize monthly press briefings and prepare and disseminate monthly, quarterly, and annual socio-economic presentations, bulletins, and publications in printed and electronic forms;
To supervise printed and electronic products produced across the sector;
To coordinate ODIN and SPI activities, provide guidance to other units, and monitor implementation;
To implement information security management system policies, rules, and procedures in its operations;
To ensure implementation of the Law on Civil Service, Labor Law, Archives Law, and other relevant legislation;
To identify, assess, and manage risks related to the unit’s functions, and cooperate with the unit responsible for operations and risk management in organizing training and methodological support;
To implement internal activities of the division, carry out assignments from NSO management, and participate in other activities organized by the NSO.

gazar.title: Price Statistics Division
gazar.goals: Within the framework of implementing the objectives and functions of the department, to improve price statistics, calculate price statistical indicators, conduct analysis, and prepare them for dissemination to users.

Objective.title: To calculate inflation and price indices and implement the International Comparison Program (ICP).
To improve the coverage of source data and reporting used for the calculation of price indices and ensure the accuracy and reliability of the data.
To improve methodologies and methods for price statistics and carry out relevant calculations and estimations.
To improve and expand producer price statistics.
To utilize additional data sources in the production of price statistical information.
To implement relevant policy documents and programs, provide information to management, and participate in internal operations.

duties.title: To improve, develop, and implement reports, forms, guidelines, classifications, methodologies, and methods for price statistics in accordance with international standards.

To organize benchmark surveys for updating the base of the Consumer Price Index, housing price index, producer price indices of sectors, and construction cost index; to update baskets and weights; and to use the results and new base in calculations.

To process and compile weekly, monthly, and quarterly data on prices of consumer goods and services, agricultural products, average livestock market prices, producer prices of the industrial sector, producer prices in trade, transport, information and communication, hotel and restaurant sectors, export and import price indices, and housing and construction costs within the scheduled timeframe; to prepare statistical compilations, bulletins, and detailed sectoral reports; and to submit them to the unit responsible for data dissemination.
To calculate price indices required for the estimation of Gross Domestic Product (GDP).
To calculate indicators related to the evaluation of the Sustainable Development Goals associated with price statistics.
To incorporate the development direction of price statistics into long-, medium-, and short-term sectoral programs and strategic plans, and to implement the activities specified therein.
To comply with standards and quality criteria at each relevant stage and sub-stage of the Generic Statistical Business Process Model, and to prepare and document quality reports.
To conduct regular self-assessments within the framework of quality management and improve performance and data quality based on the results.

To develop software requirements in accordance with updated and newly approved price statistical forms and guidelines, submit them to the information processing and technology unit, and test and accept newly developed software.

To conduct quality control over the price data collection process and primary data gathered at the initial stage, ensuring accuracy, improving data quality, and maintaining consistency among indicators.
To develop time series for price statistical indicators, maintain and enrich databases, and prepare metadata.
To prepare the required price statistical indicators for international statistical databases on a monthly, quarterly, and annual basis.
To implement the International Comparison Program (ICP) and collect and submit the required data.
To improve, develop, and expand price statistics, cooperate with relevant institutions in this field, and utilize additional data sources for compiling and processing information.
To participate in and jointly organize international and domestic training, seminars, meetings, and discussions for users and stakeholders of price statistical information.

To prepare and provide price statistical information on a monthly, quarterly, and annual basis in response to requests from citizens, government institutions, international organizations, and other users.
To ensure compliance with the Civil Service Law, the Labor Law, the Archives Law, and other relevant legislation and regulations.
To prepare draft proposals and recommendations aimed at improving and updating rules and regulations within the scope of assigned responsibilities.
To comply with and ensure the implementation of policies, rules, and procedures of the Information Security Management System in daily operations.

To identify and assess potential risks related to the unit’s functions, implement risk management measures, and cooperate with the unit responsible for operations and risk management in organizing training and methodological support.

To implement the internal activities of the department and division, carry out tasks assigned by the leadership of the National Statistics Office, and participate in other activities organized by the National Statistics Office.

gazar.title: Agriculture, Environment and Industry Statistics Division
gazar.goals: To compile the statistical indicators for agriculture, industry, construction, environment, and disaster statistics as stipulated in the Law on Statistics, conduct analysis, and prepare them for dissemination to users.

Objective.title: To improve the classifications, methodologies, and methods of statistical indicators related to agriculture, environment, and industrial statistics, and to calculate and analyze the relevant indicators.

To develop the concepts, questionnaires, forms, and guidelines for censuses and surveys in the fields of agriculture, environment, and industrial statistics; to organize and manage these censuses and surveys; and to consolidate the results.
To collect annual data from the agriculture and industrial sectors and to calculate sectoral value added.
To implement relevant policy documents and programs, provide information to management, and participate in internal operations.

duties.title: To improve, develop, and implement reports, forms, guidelines, census and survey concepts, classifications, and methodologies for agriculture, industry, construction, environment, and disaster statistics in accordance with international standards; and to calculate and analyze the relevant indicators.
To organize, monitor, and verify censuses and sample surveys of agriculture, livestock, pets, fences, and wells; to consolidate the results; and to prepare analytical reports and summaries.
To estimate the informal sector in the mining industry and provide the results for integration into the national accounts.

To process and compile monthly, quarterly, and annual data on agriculture, industry, construction, environment, disaster statistics, and statistics related to veterinary services, forestry, fisheries, and hunting within the scheduled timeframe; to establish and maintain databases; and to prepare statistical compilations, monthly reports, and detailed sectoral analyses, and submit them to the unit responsible for data dissemination.
To collect annual data from the agriculture, industry, and construction sectors; calculate sectoral value added; and submit the results for integration into the national accounts.

To conduct quality control over the data collection process and primary data collected in the agriculture, environment, and industrial sectors; ensure the reliability and accuracy of the data; improve data quality; and maintain consistency among indicators.
To comply with standards and quality criteria at each relevant stage and sub-stage of the Generic Statistical Business Process Model, and to prepare and document quality reports.
To develop and improve statistics related to agriculture, industry, construction, environment, and disasters in accordance with long-, medium-, and short-term sectoral development programs.

To cooperate with the unit responsible for the business register in ensuring consistency of information related to the activities and employment of enterprises and establishments in order to prepare coverage for full enumeration and sample surveys in the agriculture, industry, construction, environment, and disaster sectors.

To cooperate with the unit responsible for sampling in designing samples, sample frames, and allocations for censuses and surveys in the agriculture, industry, construction, environment, and disaster sectors.

To progressively develop indicators for evaluating the Sustainable Development Goals related to agriculture, industry, construction, environment, and disaster sectors, and to develop and localize relevant methodologies.
To compile statistical information on food security.

To develop software requirements in accordance with updated and newly approved forms and guidelines for agriculture, industry, construction, environment, and disaster statistics; to submit these requirements to the information technology unit; and to test and accept newly developed software.

To prepare orders for printing statistical report forms for agriculture, industry, construction, environment, and disaster sectors and for distributing them to local offices; and to submit the original forms together with the order to the unit responsible for data dissemination.
To prepare the required indicators related to agriculture, industry, construction, environment, and disaster statistics for international statistical databases.

To input and enrich statistical data for agriculture, industry, construction, environment, and disaster sectors in statistical databases; to prepare metadata; and to provide additional statistical data requested by users that are not included in the integrated database to the data dissemination unit.

To participate in and jointly organize international and domestic training, seminars, meetings, and discussions for producers, users, and other stakeholders of statistical information in agriculture, industry, construction, environment, and disaster sectors.
To ensure compliance with the Civil Service Law, the Labor Law, the Archives Law, and other relevant legislation and regulations.
To prepare draft proposals and recommendations for improving and updating rules and regulations within the scope of assigned responsibilities.
To comply with and ensure the implementation of policies, rules, and procedures of the Information Security Management System in daily operations.

To identify and assess potential risks related to the unit’s functions, implement risk management measures, and cooperate with the unit responsible for operations and risk management in organizing training and methodological support.

To implement the internal activities of the department and division, carry out tasks assigned by the leadership of the National Statistics Office, and participate in other activities organized by the National Statistics Office.

gazar.title: Monetary, Financial and Service Statistics Division
gazar.goals: To compile the statistical indicators for the monetary, financial, and service sectors as stipulated in the Law on Statistics, conduct analysis, and prepare them for dissemination to users.

Objective.title: To improve classifications, methodologies, and methods for monetary, financial, and service statistics, and to calculate and analyze the relevant indicators.

To collect and disseminate bi-weekly, monthly, quarterly, and annual data on monetary, financial, and service statistics; to calculate sectoral value added; and to submit the results for consolidation.
To utilize additional data sources in producing statistical indicators for the service sector.
To implement relevant policy documents and programs, provide information to management, and participate in internal operations.

duties.title: To improve, develop, and implement reports, forms, guidelines, survey concepts, classifications, methodologies, and methods for monetary, financial, and service statistics in accordance with international standards; and to calculate and analyze relevant sectoral indicators.
To collect annual data from the monetary, financial, and service sectors; calculate sectoral value added; and submit the results for integration into the national accounts.

To conduct quality control over the data collection process and primary data in the monetary, financial, and service sectors; ensure data accuracy and reliability; improve data quality; and maintain consistency among indicators.
To comply with standards and quality criteria at each stage and sub-stage of the Generic Statistical Business Process Model, and to prepare and document quality reports.
To conduct regular self-assessments within the framework of quality management and improve performance and data quality based on the results.

To incorporate the development of monetary, financial, and service statistics into long-, medium-, and short-term sectoral programs and strategic plans, and to implement the activities specified therein.

To process and compile monthly, quarterly, and annual data within the scheduled timeframe for sectors including banking, finance, insurance, capital markets, financial activities, non-bank financial institutions (NBFIs), savings and credit cooperatives, pawnshops, real estate, brokerage and dealer activities, agricultural commodity exchange, other financial institutions, government budget, public debt, foreign trade, balance of payments, housing services, food services, transport, information and communication, domestic trade, tourism, non-governmental organizations, condominium associations, administrative and support services, real estate activities, and professional and scientific services; to establish databases; and to prepare statistical compilations, bulletins, and detailed sectoral reports, and submit them to the unit responsible for data dissemination.

To cooperate with the unit responsible for the business register to ensure consistency of enterprise and employment data for preparing coverage of full enumeration and sample surveys in the monetary, financial, and service sectors.
To progressively develop and localize indicators and methodologies for evaluating the Sustainable Development Goals related to the monetary, financial, and service sectors.
To develop software requirements based on updated and newly approved forms and guidelines; submit them to the information technology unit; and test and accept newly developed software.
To prepare orders for printing report forms and distributing them to local offices, and submit the original forms together with the order to the unit responsible for data dissemination.
To cooperate in designing samples and sampling procedures for reports, surveys, and studies, and to implement data dissemination.
To prepare the required indicators for international statistical databases related to the monetary, financial, and service sectors.

To input and enrich statistical data in databases; prepare metadata; and provide additional statistical data requested by users that are not included in the integrated database to the data dissemination unit.

To participate in and jointly organize international and domestic training, seminars, meetings, and discussions for producers, users, and stakeholders of statistical information in the monetary, financial, and service sectors.
To utilize additional data sources in producing monetary, financial, and service statistical information.
To ensure compliance with the Civil Service Law, the Labor Law, the Archives Law, and other relevant legislation and regulations.
To prepare draft proposals and recommendations aimed at improving and updating rules and regulations within the scope of assigned responsibilities.
To comply with and ensure the implementation of policies, rules, and procedures of the Information Security Management System in daily operations.

To identify and assess potential risks related to the unit’s functions, implement risk management measures, and cooperate with the unit responsible for operations and risk management in organizing training and methodological support.

To implement the internal activities of the department and division, carry out tasks assigned by the leadership of the National Statistics Office, and participate in other activities organized by the National Statistics Office.

gazar.title: Social Statistics department
gazar.goals: Within the scope of the authority granted and responsibilities assigned by law to the National Statistics Office, to organize statistical surveys in the social sector; to develop and improve relevant social sector indicators, classifications, methodologies, methods, concepts, questionnaires, reports, forms, and guidelines in accordance with international standards; to calculate indicators, compile results, analyze the data, and disseminate the information to the public.

Objective.title: To develop statistical indicators for the social sector as stipulated in the Law on Statistics.

To organize sample surveys on household socio-economic conditions, the labour force, time use, democratic governance, social indicators, and the crime victimization survey; to conduct calculations and process the results.
To improve the methodology of social statistics in line with the implementation levels of the Generic Statistical Business Process Model.

duties.title: To develop and improve social sector statistical indicators as well as the concepts, questionnaires, forms, guidelines, classifications, methodologies, and methods used in social statistics surveys.

To improve the quality of primary data collected for social sector statistics and surveys, ensure consistency among data sources, perform calculations, compile results, and conduct in-depth analyses and studies when necessary.
To comply with standards and quality criteria at each relevant stage and sub-stage of the Generic Statistical Business Process Model and ensure proper documentation.
To improve performance and data quality based on the results of quality management.
To automate the processing of statistical reports, data, and surveys and take measures to simplify data processing procedures.
To participate in and jointly organize international and domestic training sessions, seminars, meetings, and discussions for producers, users, and other stakeholders of social statistics.
To conduct analytical calculations and research activities in response to requests from the State Great Khural, the Government, other government institutions, and users.
To ensure compliance with the Civil Service Law, the Labor Law, the Archives Law, and other relevant legislation and regulations.
To prepare draft proposals and recommendations for improving and updating rules and regulations within the scope of assigned responsibilities.
To comply with and ensure the implementation of the policies of the Information Security Management System in operational activities.

To identify and assess potential risks related to the functions of the department, register them in the risk database, implement risk mitigation and preventive measures, organize reporting, training, and methodological support, and prepare proposals for decision-making by relevant councils and management in cooperation with the unit responsible for operations and risk management.

To implement the internal activities of the department, carry out tasks assigned by the leadership of the National Statistics Office, and participate in other activities organized by the National Statistics Office

gazar.title: Social Statistics Division
gazar.goals: Within the framework of executing the agency’s mandate, this sector is responsible for developing and standardizing methodological frameworks, concepts, questionnaires, forms, and instructions for social sector statistics and surveys; for organizing and coordinating social sector surveys; for analysing the resulting data; and for producing social statistics indicators to inform policymakers and users. It also carries out calculations of the social sector value added and provides information to policymakers and users based on these estimates.

Objective.title: Develop, refine, and introduce new methodological approaches, classifications, and instruments for social sector statistics; compute and analyse social indicators; and provide information services to users.

Ensure the quality of social sector statistical data by applying relevant international standards and quality criteria at the corresponding stages and sub stages of the official statistical production process.
Develop conceptual frameworks for social sector surveys; coordinate and oversee their implementation; and consolidate and disseminate survey results.
Support the implementation of related policy documents and programmes, inform senior management, and participate in the agency’s internal operations.

duties.title: Improve and harmonize, with international standards, the forms, questionnaires, instructions, methodological frameworks, and classifications used in social sector statistics and reporting; and ensure their consistent application.

Receive, verify, compute, and consolidate on a monthly, quarterly, and annual basis statistical data on health; health insurance; disabilities and developmental disabilities; education; science and technology; intellectual property; culture and arts; law and the judiciary; crime; corruption; elections; governance; political parties; social insurance; social assistance; wages and salaries; physical education and sport; housing; public utilities; the print media; religious institutions; selected social status indicators; gender; human rights; the family; children; and youth; and prepare summaries, presentations, dashboards, infographics, and monitoring boards from the resulting indicators.

Refine and harmonize with international standards the conceptual frameworks, questionnaires, instructions, and related classifications for sample based social sector surveys including: risk of victimization surveys, crime victimization surveys, and time use surveys.
Improve, in collaboration with relevant agencies, the forms, instructions, and methodologies used to collect administrative and official statistical data in the social sector.
Develop and refine the methodology for calculating the Human Development Index and carry out the corresponding computations.

Organize and coordinate data collection activities for social sector surveys; verify the coherence of primary data; integrate and consolidate the data into unified databases; and carry out data processing and analysis.
Compute relevant indicators from primary social sector survey data; consolidate results; prepare reports and analytical presentations; and make them available as public products.

In line with revised or newly approved forms and instructions, develop draft programme of work documents and outcome oriented reporting templates and hand them over to the information technology unit; pilot newly developed software programmes and accept them into operation.

Assess progress towards Sustainable Development Goals and other development programmes and objectives; develop, phase in, and maintain time series of social sector indicators; and regularly update these indicator sets.
Compute the social sector value added on a quarterly and annual basis and transfer the results to the unit responsible for national accounts compilation.

Build and maintain time series of social statistics indicators; prepare metadata and metadata documentation; upload data into the official statistical information system; and carry out regular updates.
Upon user requests, prepare statistics and microdata that are not yet included in the centralized statistical database and transfer them to the relevant agencies and units.
Compile and provide to the databases and compendia of international organizations the required social sector indicators on a quarterly and annual basis.
Implement the activities specified in medium  and long term sectoral programmes and strategies.

Apply the prescribed standards and quality criteria at each relevant stage and sub stage of the general statistical production model; prepare quality reports for producers and users; and ensure proper documentation.
Implement regular quality assessments within the framework of quality management and, based on the results, improve data quality and operational performance.
Participate in international and domestic trainings, seminars, workshops, and dialogues for producers, users, and other stakeholders of social statistics, and jointly organize such events.
Ensure compliance with the Law on Public Service, the Law on Labour, the Law on Archives, and other relevant legislation.
Prepare proposals and draft amendments to improve and update the internal regulations and instructions governing the sector’s mandate.
Implement and comply with the policies, rules, and procedures of the information security management system in all operational activities and ensure their effective application.

Identify, assess, and manage risks associated with the sector’s mandate; implement corresponding preventive and corrective measures; and coordinate training and methodological support in collaboration with the agency’s Department of Risk and Internal Audit.
Carry out internal operations for the agency and the sector; implement tasks assigned by the agency’s leadership; and participate in other activities organized by the agency.

gazar.title: Household-Based Survey Division
gazar.goals: Within the framework of fulfilling the agency’s mandate, this sector is responsible for developing and standardizing concepts, methodologies, questionnaires, forms, and guidelines for household level surveys on population living standards and the labour market; for organizing and implementing household living standards and labour force surveys; for carrying out data analysis; and for producing a package of indicators on population living standards and the labour market to inform policymakers and other users.

Objective.title: Develop the conceptual frameworks, methodology, and operational guidance for household socio economic surveys, labour force surveys, and democratic governance surveys; coordinate and oversee their implementation; and consolidate results and carry out statistical calculations.

Ensure the quality and representativeness of household socio economic, labour force, and democratic governance survey data by applying relevant international standards and quality criteria at the corresponding stages and sub stages of the official statistical production process.
Develop, improve, and introduce new methodological approaches for population living standards and labour market statistics; compute and analyse indicators; and provide information services to users.
Support the implementation of related policy documents and programmes, inform senior management, and participate in the agency’s internal operations.

duties.title: Refine and harmonize, with international standards, the conceptual frameworks, methodologies, instruments (questionnaires, forms, instructions), and classifications used in household socio economic surveys, labour force surveys, democratic governance surveys, and other population living standards and labour market surveys.

Consolidate the information base for household socio economic surveys, labour force surveys, and related population living standards and labour market surveys; verify linkages among indicators; compute and analyse household income, expenditure, consumption, population living standards indicators, poverty indicators, labour market indicators, employment status, underemployment, double employment, informal employment, and child labour indicators, as well as other required statistics; and produce reports, presentations, summaries, dashboards, infographics, and monitoring boards.
Calculate the national minimum living standard.

Harmonize, with international standards, the methodologies, instruments (questionnaires, forms, instructions), and classifications used for statistics on workers employed abroad under labour contracts, state civil servants, labour dispute statistics, occupational accidents, acute poisonings, and Mongolian citizens posted abroad under labour contract arrangements.

Receive, consolidate, and process monthly, quarterly, and annual statistics on workers employed abroad under labour contracts, state civil servants, labour disputes, occupational accidents, acute poisonings, and Mongolian citizens posted abroad under labour contract arrangements; verify and compute these statistics; and prepare analytical outputs and presentations.

Improve, in collaboration with relevant agencies, the administrative and official statistical data on workers employed abroad under labour contracts, state civil servants, labour disputes, occupational accidents, acute poisonings, and Mongolian citizens posted abroad under labour contract arrangements.

Prepare draft programmes of work, outcome oriented reporting templates, and other programme documentation in line with revised or newly approved forms, questionnaires, and instructions, and hand them over to the information technology unit; pilot newly developed programmes and accept them into operation.
Organize and coordinate the implementation of household socio economic surveys, labour force surveys, democratic governance surveys, and other population living standards and labour market surveys.

Compute indicators aligned with the Sustainable Development Goals from the results of household socio economic surveys, labour force surveys, democratic governance surveys, and other population living standards and labour market surveys, as well as from administrative sources; build and regularly update time series of these indicators.

Phased development of Sustainable Development Goal indicators from household socio economic surveys, labour force surveys, and other population living standards and labour market surveys as well as from administrative sources.
At the request of users, compute specific indicators on population living standards and the labour market on a case by case basis from household surveys and administrative data.
Ensure proper documentation and archiving of population living standards and labour market survey and administrative data and reports.
Provide training for data collection staff engaged in population living standards and labour market surveys; monitor data collection activities; and issue instructions and technical guidance.
Work to improve the quality of population living standards and labour market surveys and to increase response rates.
Contribute to the design of survey coverage and sampling frames, in collaboration with the sampling design unit.
Compute indicators required for international databases and reporting systems from survey results and administrative statistics, and supply them to the relevant international organizations.

Build and maintain time series of official statistics and administrative indicators on population living standards and the labour market; prepare metadata and metadata documentation; upload data into the official statistical information system; and carry out regular updates.
Process and disseminate the results of the democratic governance survey.
Apply, at each relevant stage and sub stage of the general statistical production model, the prescribed standards and quality criteria; prepare and document quality reports for producers and users.
Conduct regular quality assessments within the framework of quality management, and implement improvements in performance and data quality based on the assessment results.

Participate in, and jointly organize, international and domestic trainings, seminars, workshops, and discussions for producers, users, and other stakeholders of population living standards and labour market statistics.
Ensure compliance with the Law on Public Service, the Law on Labour, the Law on Archives, and other relevant legislation.
Prepare proposals and draft amendments to improve and update the internal regulations and instructions governing the sector’s mandate.
Implement and comply with the policies, rules, and procedures of the information security management system in all operational activities and ensure their effective application.

Identify, assess, and manage risks that may arise within the sector’s mandate; implement corresponding preventive and corrective measures; and coordinate training and methodological support with the agency’s Department of Risk and Internal Audit.
Carry out internal operations within the sector, implement tasks assigned by the agency’s leadership, and participate in other activities organized by the agency.

gazar.title: Data Policy and Statistical Registers Department
gazar.goals: This department is responsible for developing and implementing national level data policy frameworks, data governance directions, standards for data and metadata, and a policy for data integration within the statistical system. It is also tasked with organizing the population, household, and business registers, as well as population and housing censuses and business censuses, in accordance with the Law on Statistics, and for developing and refining the methodological frameworks and survey sampling designs used in these operations.

Objective.title: Develop and implement agency level and national level policies and strategic directions for data governance and data management within the statistical system.
Gradually implement the necessary coordination measures—including data standards, classifications, codes, and metadata standards—required to establish a unified, government wide data repository.

Improve and professionalize data governance and data management arrangements, including the design and implementation of national and international projects and programmes in collaboration with domestic and international partners.

Support the implementation of methodological and organizational measures to ensure the accuracy, coverage, and quality of primary data and information from censuses and surveys, in close coordination with other units.
Organize the periodic and inter censal population and housing censuses, as well as business enterprise censuses; consolidate their results; and make them available as public good products.
Ensure the day to day, normal operation of the population, household, and business enterprise registers.

Prepare, process, consolidate, and disseminate population, household, and business enterprise register data; and develop or refine the related forms, questionnaires, instructions, classifications, methodological frameworks, and standard operating procedures.

duties.title: Establish a data governance framework for the statistical organization and provide ongoing support for its implementation.
Define the national data integration policy, set up the required coordination mechanisms and institutional arrangements, and ensure their effective implementation.

Develop and refine the methodologies for data collection and data analysis in line with the standards and quality criteria prescribed at each stage and sub stage of the general statistical production model.

Develop methodological frameworks for assessing the quality of primary and administrative data; conduct quality assessment exercises; and provide technical guidance and recommendations to improve data quality.

Identify new sources of data (for example, administrative registers, digital platforms, and big data sources) and coordinate the design and implementation of measures to incorporate them into official statistics.

Develop and improve the national statistical classification system; ensure its application across the national statistical system; and organize training and capacity building activities for classification users.
Continuously update and refine sampling methodology and survey design principles, including stratification, sample size determination, and weighting procedures.

Organize, at the national level and in accordance with United Nations recommendations, the periodic and inter censal population and housing censuses; consolidate and publish their results as public products.
Organize business enterprise censuses and surveys; consolidate the results; and release them as public statistics.

Develop, at the national level, the conceptual frameworks, methodologies, procedures, and instructions for the population and housing censuses and business enterprise censuses, ensuring alignment with internationally accepted statistical practices.
Carry out the internal operations of the department; implement tasks assigned by the agency’s leadership; and participate in other activities organized by the agency.
Conduct consultation type surveys (e.g., stakeholder consultation surveys), consolidate and analyse their results, and disseminate them as public products.
At the request of government agencies, non governmental organizations, international organizations, and other users, carry out specific surveys, analytical studies, and statistical estimates.
Ensure compliance with the Law on Public Service, the Law on Labour, the Law on Archives, and other relevant legislation.
Prepare proposals and draft amendments to improve and update the regulations and instructions governing the department’s mandate.
Implement and comply with the policies, rules, and procedures of the organization wide information security management system in all operational activities and ensure their effective application.

In collaboration with the agency’s Risk and Internal Audit Unit, identify, assess, and record risks associated with the department’s mandate; design and implement risk mitigation and preventive measures; and prepare and disseminate recommendations to senior management, including through periodic reports and trainings, on how to reduce risk levels.
Carry out the department’s internal operations; implement tasks assigned by the agency’s leadership; and participate in other activities organized by the agency.

gazar.title: Statistical Registers and Census Division
gazar.goals: Within the framework of the department’s mandate, this section is responsible for operating and maintaining the national population, household, and business register systems; for updating these systems; for conducting methodologically sound quality assessments of primary data; and for organizing the Population and Housing Census and the Business Enterprise Census, consolidating and publishing their results as public products. It also develops demographic and business demographic statistics, carries out analytical work on these data, and ensures the accuracy and integrity of population, household, and business enterprise statistics.

Objective.title: Integrate the national population and household register and the statistical business register with other government level data repositories; and enhance the quality of these data.

Ensure the quality of the initial stage data in the population and household registers and the business register; improve their coherence; compute demographic indicators and population mobility indicators, as well as business demography statistics; build time series; prepare metadata; upload the data into the centralized statistical database; and develop and apply related operational guidelines.
Organize the collection of data for the Population and Housing Census and the Business Enterprise Census; consolidate the results; and make them available as public good products.
Conduct referenda and opinion poll surveys in accordance with the Law on Referenda and Opinion Poll Surveys; consolidate the results; and disseminate them as public products.

Carry out, in line with established methodological frameworks, regular quality assessments of data stored in statistical information systems, and implement periodic improvement activities based on the assessment results.
Integrate administrative and other source data, process and analyse the merged datasets, and disseminate the results, thereby increasing the use and reuse of official statistics.
Organize quality assessment exercises for primary data in accordance with the prescribed quality assessment indicators, methodological frameworks, and methods.
Support the implementation of related policy documents and programmes, provide information services to management, and participate in the department’s internal operations.

duties.title: Organize, at the national level, the Population and Housing Census and the Business Enterprise Census; consolidate and process the results; make them available as public products; and compute and expand Sustainable Development Goal related indicators.

Verify the internal coherence of primary data from the Population and Housing Census, the Business Enterprise Census, and related surveys; integrate the relevant databases; compute key indicators; analyse and document the results; and produce reports, presentations, and summaries for public dissemination.

Improve the coherence and accuracy of population, household, 100 and older age cohorts, natural and internal migration, internal and external migration, governance related, geographical area based, and business register statistics; ensure their quality and coverage; and align them with international standards. Receive, verify, consolidate, and process monthly, quarterly, and annual statistics; produce summary products and presentations; build time series; prepare metadata; upload the data into the centralized statistical database; and carry out regular enrichment of the database.

Prepare, on a regular schedule, the population, household, natural movement, internal and external migration, border crossing citizen, transport vehicle, and business register statistics required for international databases and compendia.
Produce population projections, organize consultations and peer review exercises, and disseminate the approved projections to users.

Ensure the day to day stable operation of the Population and Household Information System and the Business Register database; provide technical guidance and training to data entry staff and responsible officials at the bag, khoroo, sum, district, and regional levels.

Develop, in line with revised or newly approved forms and instructions for population, household, natural and internal/external migration, border crossing citizens, transport vehicles, business register data, censuses, and surveys, the necessary programme of work documents and hand them over to the information technology unit; pilot implemented software modules and accept them into operation.

Develop, together with the information technology unit, the design and operational guidelines for software that links the Population and Household Information System and the Business Register database with other government level information systems; pilot and accept such software modules and ensure their integration into routine operations.
Apply, at each relevant stage and sub stage of the general statistical production model, the prescribed standards and quality criteria; prepare and document quality reports for producers and users.
Conduct regular internal quality assessments within the framework of quality management and, based on the results, improve the quality of statistical outputs and operational performance.

At the user’s request, prepare and provide population, household, natural movement, internal and external migration, and business register statistics that are not yet included in the centralized statistical database.
Organize opinion poll and referendum type data collection activities in accordance with the Law on Referenda and Opinion Poll Surveys.
Identify and evaluate new data sources; design and implement measures to incorporate them into official statistics; and support their operational integration.
Apply the prescribed standards and quality criteria at each relevant stage and sub stage of the general statistical production model; prepare and document quality reports for producers and users.
Ensure compliance with the Law on Public Service, the Law on Labour, the Law on Archives, and other relevant legislation.
Prepare proposals and draft amendments to improve and update the internal regulations and instructions governing the section’s mandate.
Implement and comply with the policies, rules, and procedures of the organization wide information security management system in all operational activities and ensure their effective application.

In collaboration with the agency’s Risk and Internal Audit Unit, identify, assess, and manage risks associated with the section’s mandate; implement risk mitigation measures; and organize training and methodological support to strengthen institutional capacity.
Carry out the department’s and section’s internal operations; implement tasks assigned by the agency’s leadership; and participate in other activities organized by the agency.

gazar.title: Business registration and census Division
gazar.goals: Improve the quality and coverage of business records within the framework of the implementation of land functions, organize the work of conducting censuses and surveys based on business records, maintain, enrich, and provide the foundation of business records.

Objective.title: Organization of censuses and surveys based on business records at the national level, compilation of results and making them available to the public;
Keeping business registers, ensuring the quality of primary data, improving coherence, calculating indicators of business registers, creating dynamics, preparing metadata, entering into databases;
Development, improvement and implementation of statistical categories of business registration;
Coordinating and connecting the databases of relevant government institutions with statistical databases within the framework of the creation of a large state database;
Implement relevant policy documents and programs, provide information to management, and participate in internal activities.

duties.title: Бизнесийн бүртгэлд суурилсан тооллого, судалгааг улсын хэмжээнд зохион байгуулах, үр дүнг нэгтгэн боловсруулах, нийтийн хүртээл болгох;

Статистикийн үйл ажиллагааны ерөнхий загварын холбогдох үе шат, дэд шат бүрт мөрдөх стандарт, чанарын шалгуур үзүүлэлтүүдийг мөрдөж, үйлдвэрлэгчийн болон хэрэглэгчид зориулсан чанарын тайлан бичиж, баримтжуулалт хийх;
Чанарын удирдлагын хүрээнд өөрийн үнэлгээг тогтмол хийж, үр дүнд үндэслэн гүйцэтгэлийн болон мэдээллийн чанарыг сайжруулж ажиллах;
Бизнесийн бүртгэлийн ангилал, аргачлал, журам, маягт, зааврыг боловсруулах, шинэчлэх, баталж мөрдөх;
Салбарын урт, дунд, богино хугацааны хөтөлбөрт тусгагдсаны дагуу бизнесийн бүртгэлийн хөгжүүлэх, боловсронгуй болгох;
Бизнесийн бүртгэлийн мэдээг графикт хугацаанд хөтлөх, нэгтгэх, мэдээллийн сан байгуулах, статистикийн эмхэтгэл, танилцуулгыг бэлтгэж, мэдээлэл тархаалт хариуцсан нэгжид хүлээлгэн өгөх;
Бизнесийн бүртгэлийн салбарын жилийн дэлгэрэнгүй танилцуулгыг бэлтгэж, зохих шатны хяналтуудыг хийж, мэдээлэл тархаалт хариуцсан нэгжид хүлээлгэн өгөх;
Бизнесийн бүртгэлийн санд үндэслэн албан ёсны статистикийн мэдээлэлд хамрагдах аж ахуйн нэгж, байгууллагын түүврийн хүрээг бэлтгэх;
Аж ахуйн нэгж, байгууллагын тооллогын бэлэн болсон мэдээллийн санг холбогдох газар, хэлтэс хүлээлгэн өгөх, бизнесийн бүртгэлийн санд баяжилт хийх;

Бизнесийн бүртгэлийн сангийн чанарыг сайжруулах, статистикийн нэгжийг тодорхойлох, томоохон аж ахуйн нэгжийн дүр зургийг тодорхойлох судалгааг зохион байгуулах, үр дүнг нэгтгэж, танилцуулга, тайланг боловсруулах, бизнес регистрийн санд тусгах;
Бизнесийн өөрчлөлт, хөдөлгөөний анализ хийж, үр дүнгийн танилцуулга боловсруулах;

Бизнес регистрийн санг улсын бүртгэл, татвар, гааль, нийгмийн даатгал, боловсрол, эрүүл мэнд зэрэг холбогдох асуудал хариуцсан төрийн байгууллагын захиргааны мэдээллийн сантай холбох арга хэмжээг үе шаттайгаар авч хэрэгжүүлэх;
Тогтвортой хөгжлийн зорилтыг үнэлэх бизнесийн бүртгэлийн холбогдох шалгуур үзүүлэлтүүдийг үе шаттайгаар бий болгох;
Бизнесийн бүртгэлийн мэдээллийн боловсруулалтын баримтжуулалтыг хийж хэвших;
Бизнесийн бүртгэл, тооллого, судалгааны үзүүлэлтийн динамикийг бүрдүүлэх, мета мэдээллийг бэлтгэх, мэдээллийн санд оруулах;

Бизнесийн бүртгэлийн шинэчилсэн болон шинээр батлагдсан маягт, зааврын дагуу бодлогын даалгаврыг боловсруулах, мэдээллийн технологийн нэгжид хүлээлгэн өгөх, шинээр боловсруулсан программыг турших, хүлээн авах, нэвтрүүлэх;

Бизнесийн бүртгэлийн санг төрийн бусад байгууллагын мэдээллийн сантай холбох, уялдуулах программ хангамжийн бодлогын даалгавар боловсруулах, мэдээллийн технологийн нэгжид хүлээлгэн өгөх, программ хангамжийг турших, хүлээн авах, нэвтрүүлэх;
Шинэчилсэн ангилал, кодыг бизнесийн бүртгэлийн сан, төрийн бусад байгууллагын бүртгэлийн санд нэвтрүүлэх;
Бизнесийн бүртгэлийн мэдээ, тайлангийн маягтыг хэвлүүлэх, орон нутагт хүргүүлэх захиалгыг гарган маягтын эхийн хамт мэдээлэл тархаалт хариуцсан нэгжид хүлээлгэн өгөх;
Олон улсын байгууллагын мэдээллийн санд шаардлагатай бизнесийн бүртгэл, тооллогын үзүүлэлтүүдийг сар, улирал, жилээр бэлтгэх;
Судалгаа хариуцсан нэгжтэй хамтран судлаач нарын ажлыг мэргэжлийн болон арга зүйн нэгдсэн удирдлагаар хангаж ажиллах, хяналт тавих;
Цуглуулж буй анхдагч мэдээллийн чанарын болон мэдээлэл цуглуулалтын явцын хяналтыг холбогдох газар, хэлтсүүдтэй хамтран зохион байгуулж байх;
Газар, хэлтсийн дотоод үйл ажиллагааг хэрэгжүүлэх, хорооны удирдлагын өгсөн үүрэг даалгаврыг хэрэгжүүлэх, хорооноос зохион байгуулж байгаа бусад үйл ажиллагаанд оролцох.

gazar.title: Data Policy and Sampling Division
gazar.goals: Within the framework of the department’s mandate, this section is responsible for developing and implementing national level and statistical organizational data governance and data policy frameworks, data integration policies, and standards for data and metadata, as well as for improving and harmonizing survey sampling methodology under a unified management framework.

Objective.title: Develop and implement a national level data governance and data policy framework for the statistical system, and ensure its effective application.

Develop, approve, and embed data and metadata standards, together with related instructions and guidelines, into statistical data  and information system architectures, and provide support for their implementation.
Develop guidelines and procedures for data exchange and confidentiality; and monitor their implementation across the system.
Build datasets from heterogeneous data sources; enrich the national unified data repository; develop a data integration policy; and increase the utilization and reuse of official statistics.
Refine indicators, methodological frameworks, and methodologies for data quality assessment; and organize and coordinate data quality assessment activities.
Provide integrated planning, coordination, monitoring, and central oversight for register based censuses.
Regularly review and improve sampling designs and sampling methodology for surveys, and implement targeted measures to enhance their efficiency and representativeness.
Support the implementation of related policy documents and programmes, provide information services to management, and participate in the department’s internal operations.

duties.title: Develop and refine the national statistical classification framework; ensure its consistent application; and work in close coordination with other units.

Lead and implement data governance and data management improvement projects and programmes, including those supported by domestic and international partners, and coordinate contributions from other units.
Develop, approve, and embed data and metadata standards and related instructions and guidelines into data system architectures, and provide methodological support for their implementation.
Develop, implement, and review the sampling designs for sample surveys, and propose improvements.

In line with the sampling design, select sampling units, compute survey weights, provide methodological guidance for point estimates and sampling error calculations, carry out documentation, and prepare technical sampling reports in collaboration with relevant units.
Conduct regular self assessment within the framework of quality management and, based on the results, improve operational performance and data quality.

Identify requirements and needs for data integration; develop the underlying principles and methodological frameworks for data integration; and provide instructions and guidance to implementing units.
Refine the indicators, methodological frameworks, and methods for data quality assessment; conduct data quality assessments; and work jointly with other units to promote improvements.
Identify the needs for register based censuses; develop census planning frameworks, organizational designs, and operational models; and provide monitoring, evaluation, and central coordination.
Identify new sources of data (e.g., administrative registers, digital platforms, big data sources); coordinate the design and implementation of measures to incorporate them into official statistics.
Apply, at each relevant stage and sub stage of the general statistical production model, the prescribed standards and quality criteria; prepare and document quality reports for producers and users.
Ensure compliance with the Law on Public Service, the Law on Labour, the Law on Archives, and other relevant legislation.
Prepare proposals and draft amendments to improve and update the internal regulations and instructions governing the section’s mandate.
Implement and comply with the policies, rules, and procedures of the organization wide information security management system in all operational activities and ensure their effective application.

In collaboration with the agency’s Risk and Internal Audit Unit, identify, assess, and manage risks associated with the section’s mandate; implement risk mitigation measures; and organize training and methodological support to strengthen institutional capacity.
Carry out the internal operations of the department and section; implement tasks assigned by the agency’s leadership; and participate in other activities organized by the agency.

gazar.title: Administration and Legal Affairs Section
gazar.goals: This section is responsible for organizing the implementation of the Law on Statistics and other relevant laws, regulations, decrees, and decisions at the sectoral level. It manages the planning, reporting, records management, and official document administration of the National Statistical Office within the framework of applicable laws, standards, and internal rules.

Objective.title: Ensure sector level implementation of the Law on Statistics and other related laws, regulations, decrees, and decisions, and report on their execution.
Draft, consolidate, and approve the National Statistical Office’s performance plan; oversee its implementation and produce progress and performance reports.
Organize the archival and official document management operations of the National Statistical Office in accordance with the relevant laws and regulations.
Fulfil other responsibilities assigned by the relevant legal framework.

duties.title: Ensure the implementation of the Law on Statistics and other relevant laws, regulations, decrees, and decisions at the sectoral level, and monitor and report on their execution.
Coordinate and harmonize the application of laws, rules, and internal regulations within the sector to ensure consistency.
Maintain the electronic register of regulations, instructions, forms, and methodological documents approved by the Office’s Director; update it with any amendments, additions, or revocations.
Review and ensure the legal and regulatory basis of management decisions.
Review the legal and regulatory basis of contracts and agreements with citizens, organizations, and enterprises; ensure compliance; and maintain a centralized register.
Prepare proposals to improve, update, and replace internal regulations and instructions governing the section’s mandate.
Provide legal and regulatory advice and support to civil servants on matters related to the Office’s activities.
Consolidate and finalize the Office’s performance plan, obtain approval, monitor implementation, and consolidate and report on its execution.
Consolidate the Office’s annual activity report and organize its submission to, and presentation before, the Standing Committee on Economy of the Parliament.
Organize the mid year and annual reporting meetings of the National Statistical Office; prepare and implement follow up plans for the decisions and recommendations taken at these meetings.
Consolidate and finalize the performance plan of the Chancellery Department, monitor its implementation, and report on its execution.
Organize the meetings of the National Council of Statistics; prepare and record minutes; and ensure the implementation of decisions.

Prepare and approve the agendas for the Director’s Council and the Executive Management Meeting; organize preparations, record minutes; verify and ensure implementation of decisions; and report on the execution of the workplan.
Receive and register citizens’ petitions, complaints, and proposals; monitor their processing and resolution; and produce related reports.

Organize the Office’s official document and archive management activities in accordance with the relevant laws, regulations, and instructions; exercise oversight; and produce the required information and reports.
Implement archival operations, including storage, protection, and the transfer of records to the national archives, in line with the applicable regulations.
Organize the implementation of the Law on the Rights of Older Persons.
Organize the implementation of the national anti corruption programme.
Ensure the timely and accurate submission, consolidation, and registration of declarations of conflict of interest and asset and income declarations, and monitor and report on their execution.
Organize the implementation of legislation on regulating and preventing conflicts of interest and on anti corruption and public ethics matters.
Organize the management and protection of state and official secrets at the sectoral level.
Implement and comply with the information security management system’s policies, rules, and procedures in all operational activities and ensure their effective application.

In collaboration with the Office’s Risk and Internal Audit Unit, identify, assess, and manage risks associated with the section’s mandate; implement preventive measures; and organize training and methodological support.
Carry out the department’s and section’s internal operations; implement tasks assigned by the Office’s leadership; and participate in other activities organized by the Office.

gazar.title: Human Resources and Training Section
gazar.goals: This section is responsible for formulating and implementing the human resources policy for the statistical sector; for building and consolidating a qualified, legally compliant workforce; and for professional development and capacity building of civil servants.
